offer: For property managers handling 10-50 rental units, inefficient tracking causes missed performance insights. We automate reporting instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to efficiently track key performance metrics
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property management help
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about similar tools
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Share insights in community forums for property managers
try_it: Let users try customizable reporting templates and user-friendly dashboard for quick insights on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
